creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Oct 20 05:15:19 2013
New Revision: 330976
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330976

Log:
  Chosen is a javascript library of select box enhancer for jQuery and Protoype.
  This gem integrates Chosen with Rails asset pipeline for easy of use.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/tsechingho/chosen-rails
  
  PR:		ports/182663
  Submitted by:	Loic Blot <loic.blot@unix-experience.fr>

Added:
  head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/
  head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 04:51:17 2013	(r330975)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 05:15:19 2013	(r330976)
@@ -1739,6 +1739,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-cgi_multipart_eof_fix
     SUBDIR += rubygem-chef-server-api
     SUBDIR += rubygem-chef-server-webui
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-chosen-rails
     SUBDIR += rubygem-cookiejar
     SUBDIR += rubygem-cuba
     SUBDIR += rubygem-davclient

Added: head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 05:15:19 2013	(r330976)
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	chosen-rails
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
+CATEGORIES=	www rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	box enhancer for jQuery and Protoype
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-coffee-rails>=3.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-coffee-rails \
+		rubygem-compass-rails>=1.0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/rubygem-compass-rails \
+		rubygem-railties>=3.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-railties \
+		rubygem-sass-rails>=3.2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/rubygem-sass-rails
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+NO_STAGE=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/distinfo	Sun Oct 20 05:15:19 2013	(r330976)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/chosen-rails-1.0.0.gem) = e19ee924f55b00f4d374eb0d1fd735bd2d26a1313d7788a9b84b1cfe17e9434a
+SIZE (rubygem/chosen-rails-1.0.0.gem) = 20480

Added: head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-chosen-rails/pkg-descr	Sun Oct 20 05:15:19 2013	(r330976)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+Chosen is a javascript library of select box enhancer for jQuery and Protoype.
+This gem integrates Chosen with Rails asset pipeline for easy of use.
+
+WWW: https://github.com/tsechingho/chosen-rails
